clientInit.explanation: As an interface with no public constructors but static builder() and create() methods, SqsClient follows AWS SDK v2's standard builder pattern. The builder() method provides flexible configuration options while create() offers a convenience method that internally uses the builder with defaults.

connectionFields.name: httpClient
connectionFields.description: Custom HTTP client implementation for making requests to SQS, allowing control over connection pooling, timeouts, and other HTTP-level configurations.

connectionFields.name: endpointProvider
connectionFields.description: Provider that determines the service endpoint URL for each SQS request, supporting custom endpoint resolution logic.

connectionFields.name: authSchemeProvider
connectionFields.description: Provider that resolves the authentication scheme to use for each SQS request, supporting various AWS auth mechanisms.

connectionFields.name: checksumValidationEnabled
connectionFields.description: Enables MD5 checksum validation for SQS messages to ensure message integrity during transmission.

connectionFields.name: credentialsProvider
connectionFields.description: Provides AWS credentials for authenticating requests to SQS, supporting various credential sources like IAM roles, environment variables, or explicit keys.

connectionFields.name: region
connectionFields.description: AWS region where the SQS service is located, determining the geographical endpoint for requests.

connectionFields.name: defaultsMode
connectionFields.description: Configuration mode that determines default values for various client settings based on the deployment environment.

connectionFields.name: dualstackEnabled
connectionFields.description: Enables IPv4 and IPv6 dual-stack endpoints for SQS requests when available in the region.

connectionFields.name: fipsEnabled
connectionFields.description: Enables FIPS-compliant endpoints for SQS requests to meet US government security requirements.

connectionFields.name: endpointOverride
connectionFields.description: Custom endpoint URI to override the default SQS service endpoint, useful for testing with local SQS implementations or VPC endpoints.

connectionFields.name: putAuthScheme
connectionFields.description: Adds a custom authentication scheme to the client's auth scheme registry for specialized authentication requirements.

subFields.name: accessKeyId
subFields.description: AWS access key ID for authentication.

subFields.name: secretAccessKey
subFields.description: AWS secret access key for authentication.

subFields.name: sessionToken
subFields.description: Optional session token for temporary credentials.

methods.name: addPermission

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue to which permissions are added.

requestFields.name: label
requestFields.description: The unique identification of the permission you're setting (for example, AliceSendMessage).

requestFields.name: awsAccountIds
requestFields.description: The Amazon Web Services account numbers of the principals who are to receive permission.

requestFields.name: actions
requestFields.description: The action the client wants to allow for the specified principal.

methods.description: Adds a permission to a queue for a specific principal.

methods.name: changeMessageVisibility

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue whose message's visibility is changed.

requestFields.name: receiptHandle
requestFields.description: The receipt handle associated with the message, whose visibility timeout is changed.

requestFields.name: visibilityTimeout
requestFields.description: The new value for the message's visibility timeout (in seconds).

methods.description: Changes the visibility timeout of a specified message in a queue to a new value.

methods.name: changeMessageVisibilityBatch

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue whose messages' visibility is changed.

requestFields.name: entries
requestFields.description: Lists the receipt handles of the messages for which the visibility timeout must be changed.

returnFields.name: successful
returnFields.description: A list of ChangeMessageVisibilityBatchResultEntry items.

returnFields.name: failed
returnFields.description: A list of BatchResultErrorEntry items.

methods.description: Changes the visibility timeout of multiple messages.

methods.name: createQueue

requestFields.name: queueName
requestFields.description: The name of the new queue.

requestFields.name: attributes
requestFields.description: A map of attributes with their corresponding values.

requestFields.name: tags
requestFields.description: Add cost allocation tags to the specified Amazon SQS queue.

returnFields.name: queueUrl
returnFields.description: The URL of the created Amazon SQS queue.

methods.description: Creates a new standard or FIFO queue.

methods.name: deleteMessage

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue from which messages are deleted.

requestFields.name: receiptHandle
requestFields.description: The receipt handle associated with the message to delete.

methods.description: Deletes the specified message from the specified queue.

methods.name: deleteMessageBatch

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue from which messages are deleted.

requestFields.name: entries
requestFields.description: Lists the receipt handles for the messages to be deleted.

returnFields.name: successful
returnFields.description: A list of DeleteMessageBatchResultEntry items.

returnFields.name: failed
returnFields.description: A list of BatchResultErrorEntry items.

methods.description: Deletes up to ten messages from the specified queue.

methods.name: deleteQueue

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue to delete.

methods.description: Deletes the queue specified by the QueueUrl, regardless of the queue's contents.

methods.name: getQueueAttributes

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue whose attribute information is retrieved.

requestFields.name: attributeNames
requestFields.description: A list of attributes for which to retrieve information.

returnFields.name: attributes
returnFields.description: A map of attributes to their respective values.

methods.description: Gets attributes for the specified queue.

methods.name: getQueueUrl

requestFields.name: queueName
requestFields.description: (Required) The name of the queue for which you want to fetch the URL.

requestFields.name: queueOwnerAWSAccountId
requestFields.description: (Optional) The Amazon Web Services account ID of the account that created the queue.

returnFields.name: queueUrl
returnFields.description: The URL of the queue.

methods.description: The GetQueueUrl API returns the URL of an existing Amazon SQS queue.

methods.name: listDeadLetterSourceQueues

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of a dead-letter queue.

requestFields.name: nextToken
requestFields.description: Pagination token to request the next set of results.

requestFields.name: maxResults
requestFields.description: Maximum number of results to include in the response.

returnFields.name: queueUrls
returnFields.description: A list of source queue URLs that have the RedrivePolicy queue attribute configured with a dead-letter queue.

returnFields.name: nextToken
returnFields.description: Pagination token to include in the next request.

methods.description: Returns a list of your queues that have the RedrivePolicy queue attribute configured with a dead-letter queue.

methods.name: listQueueTags

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the queue.

returnFields.name: tags
returnFields.description: The list of all tags added to the specified queue.

methods.description: List all cost allocation tags added to the specified Amazon SQS queue.

methods.name: listQueues

returnFields.name: queueUrls
returnFields.description: A list of queue URLs, up to 1,000 entries, or the value of MaxResults that you sent in the request.

returnFields.name: nextToken
returnFields.description: Pagination token to include in the next request.

methods.description: Returns a list of your queues in the current region.

methods.name: purgeQueue

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the queue from which the PurgeQueue action deletes messages.

methods.description: Deletes available messages in a queue (including in-flight messages) specified by the QueueURL parameter.

methods.name: receiveMessage

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue from which messages are received.

requestFields.name: attributeNames
requestFields.description: Deprecated.

requestFields.name: messageSystemAttributeNames
requestFields.description: A list of attributes that need to be returned along with each message.

requestFields.name: messageAttributeNames
requestFields.description: The name of the message attribute, where N is the index.

requestFields.name: maxNumberOfMessages
requestFields.description: The maximum number of messages to return.

requestFields.name: visibilityTimeout
requestFields.description: The duration (in seconds) that the received messages are hidden from subsequent retrieve requests after being retrieved by a ReceiveMessage request.

requestFields.name: waitTimeSeconds
requestFields.description: The duration (in seconds) for which the call waits for a message to arrive in the queue before returning.

requestFields.name: receiveRequestAttemptId
requestFields.description: This parameter applies only to FIFO (first-in-first-out) queues.

returnFields.name: messages
returnFields.description: A list of messages.

methods.description: Retrieves one or more messages (up to 10), from the specified queue.

methods.name: removePermission

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue from which permissions are removed.

requestFields.name: label
requestFields.description: The identification of the permission to remove.

methods.description: Revokes any permissions in the queue policy that matches the specified Label parameter.

methods.name: sendMessage

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue to which a message is sent.

requestFields.name: messageBody
requestFields.description: The message to send.

requestFields.name: delaySeconds
requestFields.description: The length of time, in seconds, for which to delay a specific message.

requestFields.name: messageAttributes
requestFields.description: Each message attribute consists of a Name, Type, and Value.

requestFields.name: messageSystemAttributes
requestFields.description: The message system attribute to send.

requestFields.name: messageDeduplicationId
requestFields.description: This parameter applies only to FIFO (first-in-first-out) queues.

requestFields.name: messageGroupId
requestFields.description: This parameter applies only to FIFO (first-in-first-out) queues.

returnFields.name: md5OfMessageBody
returnFields.description: An MD5 digest of the non-URL-encoded message body string.

returnFields.name: md5OfMessageAttributes
returnFields.description: An MD5 digest of the non-URL-encoded message attribute string.

returnFields.name: md5OfMessageSystemAttributes
returnFields.description: An MD5 digest of the non-URL-encoded message system attribute string.

returnFields.name: messageId
returnFields.description: An attribute containing the MessageId of the message sent to the queue.

returnFields.name: sequenceNumber
returnFields.description: This parameter applies only to FIFO (first-in-first-out) queues.

methods.description: Delivers a message to the specified queue.

methods.name: sendMessageBatch

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue to which batched messages are sent.

requestFields.name: entries
requestFields.description: A list of SendMessageBatchRequestEntry items.

returnFields.name: successful
returnFields.description: A list of SendMessageBatchResultEntry items.

returnFields.name: failed
returnFields.description: A list of BatchResultErrorEntry items with error details about each message that can't be enqueued.

methods.description: You can use SendMessageBatch to send up to 10 messages to the specified queue by assigning either identical or different values to each message (or by not assigning values at all).

methods.name: setQueueAttributes

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the Amazon SQS queue whose attributes are set.

requestFields.name: attributes
requestFields.description: A map of attributes to set.

methods.description: Sets the value of one or more queue attributes, like a policy.

methods.name: tagQueue

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the queue.

requestFields.name: tags
requestFields.description: The list of tags to be added to the specified queue.

methods.description: Add cost allocation tags to the specified Amazon SQS queue.

methods.name: untagQueue

requestFields.name: queueUrl
requestFields.description: The URL of the queue.

requestFields.name: tagKeys
requestFields.description: The list of tags to be removed from the specified queue.

methods.description: Remove cost allocation tags from the specified Amazon SQS queue.

fields.name: id
fields.description: An identifier for this particular receipt handle used to communicate the result.

fields.name: receiptHandle
fields.description: A receipt handle.

fields.name: visibilityTimeout
fields.description: The new value (in seconds) for the message's visibility timeout.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Represents a message whose visibility timeout has been changed successfully.

fields.description: The Id of an entry in a batch request.

fields.name: senderFault
fields.description: Specifies whether the error happened due to the caller of the batch API action.

fields.name: code
fields.description: An error code representing why the action failed on this entry.

fields.name: message
fields.description: A message explaining why the action failed on this entry.

fields.description: The identifier for this particular receipt handle.
